market_notes: Tech correction holding steady (QQQ -4.1% 1W, SMH -5.0%) with clear flight-to-quality rotation intact: ARM +4.5%, MRVL +2.2%, TSEM +31.9% 1M outperforming despite near-term pullback. Mega-cap growth under pressure (MSFT -5.8%, GOOG -8.6%) but institutional accumulation in quality infrastructure names validated by SoftBank $40B OpenAI/ARM commitment and resilient enterprise capex signals. META legal verdict on youth engagement design (36h ago) deepens structural headwinds; short position underwater but thesis remains valid. Market repricing growth expectations downward while maintaining confidence in AI capex cycle durability—semiconductor equipment, IP licensing, foundry demand remain structurally bid. Volatility elevated (META VolRatio 0.35, TSEM 0.34, ASML 0.33) but capitulation risk low with institutional accumulation. Macro uncertainty persists (Fed guidance pending, recession signals mixed) but enterprise capex resilience supports quality oversold thesis. Portfolio appropriately defensive at 79% cash with high-conviction infrastructure plays positioned for relief bounce and technical breakout confirmation.
